title: languas intermedia
intro: Languas intermedia, also known as the lesser galangal or Thai ginger, is a type of rhizomatous perennial plant native to Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Languas intermedia include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and improving circulation, as well as possessing anti-cancer properties. Languas intermedia can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in cooking and as a spice to add flavor to various dishes.
